rationale: This candidate provides the most natural and direct translation, capturing Dan's casual yet technical tone (e.g., 'S3にデータベースの真似事をさせるのはやめろ'). It correctly preserves all MDX structures, including the complex table and code blocks, and translates the subTitle which was missing in the current version. It also correctly handles the Pagefind HTML example which was broken in the 'current' and 'qwen3-32b' versions.
